DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-11-2014 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

(Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that complies with CRC 3.1312.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.
